description: The hotel experiences a sudden power outage.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the hotel's backup generator has automatically started and is powering emergency lights and essential systems (like servers and phones).

expected_outcome.value: The agent verifies that emergency systems are operational.

nodes.task_description: Contact the local utility company to report the outage and get an estimated time for restoration.

expected_outcome.value: The agent gets an ETR from the utility company.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch security and engineering staff to patrol hallways and assist any guests who need help.

expected_outcome.value: Staff are dispatched to ensure guest safety.
